hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$filepath" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$filepath" in *.py) cd /Users/tej/src/parchmark/backend && uv run ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/tej/src/parchmark/ui && npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$filepath" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$filepath" in */markdown.ts|*/markdown.py) echo '⚠️  Markdown util changed — run /parchmark-markdown-sync to verify frontend/backend parity' ;; esac; exit 0
